subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Be thou not sorrowful, let not thy heart be grieved. God willing, even as thy heart and soul desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان محزون مباش دلخون مگرد انشاء الله همانطور که آرزوی دل و جان
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution
